data.title: Three-Time Super Bowl Champion Troy Aikman Named National Spokesperson for VENU's $300+ Million Luxe FireSuite™ Triple Net Portfolio
data.description: Colorado Springs-based Venu Holding Corporation, listed on NYSE American as VENU, has selected Troy Aikman, NFL Hall of Famer and founder of EIGHT Elite Light Beer, as the national spokesperson for its Luxe FireSuite Triple Net (NNN) real estate portfolio worth $300 million. The portfolio is set to be launched across the country in the upcoming weeks. Aikman, a three-time Super Bowl champion, will be promoting the premium live entertainment destinations developed and operated by VENU.

data.title: IHOP, the OG Restaurant of Acronyms, Makes BLTAF (Bacon, Lettuce, Tomato… And Fries) Canon with New Trademark
data.description: IHOP, headquartered in Pasadena, California, is introducing a new twist to the classic BLT sandwich, now known as the BLTAF - featuring Bacon, Lettuce, Tomato, and Fries. Priced at $6, this revamped menu item is now part of IHOP's Value Menu and will be available daily from 7AM to 10PM at select IHOP locations across the United States. This new offering aims to elevate the dining experience by providing a main course with a side of fries, bringing more value and flavor to customers.

data.title: World Market Opens New Store in Hanover, MA
data.description: In Alameda, California, World Market® has unveiled its latest store at Hanover Crossing Shopping Center, Hanover, MA - marking its third establishment in Massachusetts. This new outlet located at 1775 Washington Street will operate from Monday to Friday between 10 a.m. to 8 p.m., Saturdays from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m., and Sundays from 10 a.m. to 7 p.m. World Market is renowned for its carefully selected range of chic furniture, fashionable home décor, unique gifts, and a wide selection of international foods and candies.

data.title: Flexsteel Industries, Inc. to Announce Third Quarter 2026 Results on April 20
data.description: In Dubuque, Iowa, Flexsteel Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ:FLXS), a major player in the residential furniture industry in the US, revealed plans to release its third quarter 2026 financial results on April 20, 2026, after the market closes. They will host a conference call and audio webcast for analysts and investors on April 21, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Central Time to delve into the results. Flexsteel is known for being one of the largest manufacturers, importers, and marketers of residential furniture products in the country.

data.title: National Healthcare Properties Announces Public Filing of Registration Statement
data.description: National Healthcare Properties, Inc. (NHP) announced the submission of a registration statement on Form S-11 to the SEC for a potential public offering of Class A common stock. The offering's initiation and conclusion are contingent on market conditions and standard conditions, with no guarantee of commencement or completion. The specific number of shares, price range, and terms remain undetermined. NHP seeks to list its Class A common stock on The Nasdaq Global Select Market under the symbol "NHP."
$MSTR STACKS MORE BITCOIN, HOLDINGS NEAR 767K BTC MicroStrategy bought 4,871 BTC for ~$330M (~$67.7K each). Total holdings now: 766,970 BTC acquired for ~$58B (~$75.6K average).

data.title: KUMHO TIRE U.S.A. PLEDGES $25,000 TO TIRE INDUSTRY ASSOCIATION SCHOLARSHIP FUND
data.description: Kumho Tire U.S.A., a globally recognized tire manufacturer, has pledged $25,000 to the Tire Industry Association (TIA) to aid in developing future leaders in the tire and automotive service sector. This commitment spans five years and aims to support the growth and advancement of individuals within the industry. The announcement was made in Atlanta on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Ameresco Delivers $7.8M Infrastructure Upgrade for Tacoma Public Schools to Enhance Energy Efficiency
data.description: Ameresco, a company based in Framingham, Massachusetts, has successfully enhanced energy efficiency for Tacoma Public Schools located in Tacoma, Washington. This initiative aims to improve sustainability measures and reduce overall energy consumption in the school district. The collaboration between Ameresco and Tacoma Public Schools is anticipated to result in significant cost savings and environmental benefits for the community.

data.title: Pathward Awards Grant to EmBe to Support Programs that Uplift Families
data.description: Pathward, a national bank centered on financial inclusion, has granted $30,000 to EmBe, a longstanding community partner. This grant showcases Pathward's commitment to supporting organizations like EmBe in their endeavors to make a positive impact in the community.
KIM YO JONG OF NORTH KOREA COMMENDED SOUTH KOREA'S PRESIDENT LEE FOR HIS WISE REGRET ABOUT A DRONE FLYING INTO NORTH KOREA.

data.title: Janus International Group Announces All-New, Dual Technology, Wireless Smart Lock
data.description: Temple, Georgia - Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI), a top global manufacturer of self-storage, commercial, and industrial building solutions, has introduced Nokē Infinitē. This smart locking system, part of the Nokē Smart Entry product line, utilizes both Bluetooth and power harvesting technology. Nokē Infinitē provides advanced security features for doors, marking a significant development for the company.

data.title: Real Brokerage to hold Q1 2026 earnings call - the first of the year.
data.description: The number of COVID-19 cases in the country has reached over 250,000, with more than 10,000 deaths reported. The increase in cases has prompted the government to implement stricter regulations, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limits on social gatherings of over 10 people. Hospitals are reportedly overwhelmed with patients, leading to concerns about the healthcare system's capacity. The government is urging the public to follow safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus and avoid further strain on the healthcare infrastructure.

data.title: CrowdStrike Named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Managed Detection and Response Report
data.description: An Austin-based company, CrowdStrike (CRWD) was named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Managed Detection and Response (MDR). Their product, CrowdStrike Falcon® Complete, scored a 98% willingness to recommend based on 137 responses as of January 31, 2026. In a time when adversaries are leveraging AI for more sophisticated attacks, CrowdStrike's Agentic MDR, integrating elite analyst expertise, provides enhanced security solutions.
U.S. centcom: ‘Iranian military capabilities continue to decline as U.S. forces relentlessly strike military targets inside Iran.’

data.title: WEX Files Definitive Proxy Materials and Mails Letter to Shareholders
data.description: Portsmouth, Maine - WEX (NYSE: WEX), a prominent provider of intelligent payment solutions worldwide, revealed the submission of definitive proxy materials to the Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC") for its approaching 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 5, 2026. Accompanying these materials, the company is dispatching a detailed letter to shareholders. Some key points outlined in the letter are centered on WEX's strategic vision.

data.title: Scienture Provides Annual Shareholder Update, Outlining Significant Progress and Strategic Priorities for the Year Ahead
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in Commack, NY, a holding company named Scienture Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: SCNX) released its annual update to shareholders. Scienture is dedicated to developing, marketing, and distributing innovative specialty products to address underserved market demands in the pharmaceutical sector. The update was provided by the Co-CEOs Narasimhan Mani and Shankar Hariharan. This company is focused on delivering value to patients, doctors, and caregivers.

data.title: Ridge AI Emerges from Stealth with $2.6M Pre-Seed for AI-Native Analytics That Prove a Product Team's Value in Hours
data.description: Seattle-based startup Ridge AI has recently come out of stealth mode and secured a significant pre-seed funding round totaling $2.6 million. The investment was led by Madrona and saw participation from TheFounderVC, along with a group of angel investors comprising of key figures from Tableau, Trifacta, and Streamlit. Leveraging extensive experience in data visualization research and utilizing open-source tools, Ridge AI offers a platform that empowers B2B software firms to deploy interactive dashboards and AI data agents for customers swiftly, aiming to reduce development time from months to hours. The company's inception was spearheaded by a team that includes industry veterans from high-profile tech companies.

data.title: Gartner Announces Gartner Security & Risk Management Summit 2026
data.description: Join Gartner at the upcoming Security & Risk Management Summit scheduled for June 1-3, 2026, at National Harbor, MD. This event is crucial for the cybersecurity community facing a growing threat landscape with challenges like AI, tariffs, global unrest, and regulatory changes. To attend, media personnel can register by contacting Matt.LoDolce@Gartner.com. The summit aims to facilitate the rapid exchange of insights for better preparedness in the face of evolving risks.

data.title: Social, Active, Connected: New Survey from Del Webb Reveals How Active Adults Can Thrive in an Increasingly Lonely World
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Del Webb, a prominent builder of active-adult communities, revealed that 91% of over 1,300 people aged 55+ living in its communities across 14 states feel socially connected. Amid concerns around increasing loneliness among adults, the study suggests that the location and type of residence can significantly impact feelings of connectedness and satisfaction. The findings offer a positive outlook on the role of living arrangements in promoting social interactions and well-being among older adults.

data.title: Covista Expands Michael Betz's Role to Chief Growth & Innovation Officer
data.description: In Chicago, Covista revealed that Michael Betz will assume the position of Chief Growth & Innovation Officer, oversighting the Marketing department along with his current role as President of Walden University and head of the Digital division. Covista, the largest healthcare educator in America listed on the NYSE as CVSA, aims to boost growth through innovation under Betz's leadership.
